_description: Minority interest (Non-Controlling Interest) overrides for Nifty 50 stocks. Used by fetch_data.py when Yahoo Finance does not provide minority interest data in quarterly income statements. Values are based on published consolidated annual reports and quarterly filings.
_how_to_update: After each annual report season (June-July), verify HIGH and MEDIUM confidence entries against the latest AR. Update mi_cr_annual and mi_pct_of_ni. Bump data_as_of to reflect the new AR year.
_how_applied: fetch_data.py distributes mi_cr_annual equally across 4 quarters (mi_cr_annual / 4 per quarter). This is an approximation — actual quarterly MI fluctuates but annual average is stable.

_confidence_guide.HIGH: Structurally stable — tied to fixed ownership percentages of large listed subsidiaries. Changes only if ownership structure changes. Verify annually.
_confidence_guide.MEDIUM: Reasonably stable but can fluctuate with subsidiary performance. Verify annually.
_confidence_guide.LOW: Estimated from ownership structure — actual figure not independently verified. Treat as directional, not precise. Replace with real AR figure when possible.
_confidence_guide.ZERO: Confirmed no material NCI — subsidiaries are wholly owned or NCI is negligible (<0.3% of NI).

_data_vintage: FY2024-25 (April 2024 – March 2025) annual reports and Q3 FY25 consolidated filings

GRASIM.source: Consolidated P&L — Aditya Birla Group annual report FY25
GRASIM.note: Grasim owns 57% of UltraTech Cement and 56% of Aditya Birla Capital. The remaining 43%/44% belongs to external shareholders — this is the dominant source of NCI. UltraTech alone contributes ~₹2000cr of NCI annually. This figure is structurally stable as long as ownership percentages don't change.
GRASIM.how_to_get_exact: Download Grasim FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500300. Find 'Non-Controlling Interest' in the Consolidated Statement of Profit & Loss. Sum all 4 quarters from quarterly results filings.

BAJAJFINSV.source: Consolidated P&L — Bajaj Finserv annual report FY25
BAJAJFINSV.note: Bajaj Finserv owns 52.5% of Bajaj Finance (one of India's largest NBFCs). The remaining 47.5% belongs to public shareholders — this creates massive NCI since Bajaj Finance is the primary earnings driver. NCI is ~48% of consolidated PAT. This is structurally stable unless Bajaj Finserv buys back Bajaj Finance shares.
BAJAJFINSV.how_to_get_exact: Download Bajaj Finserv FY25 Annual Report. Find NCI in Consolidated P&L. Alternatively, Bajaj Finance's standalone PAT × 47.5% = approximate NCI.

LT.source: Consolidated P&L — Larsen & Toubro annual report FY25
LT.note: L&T consolidates several listed subsidiaries with significant external shareholders: LT Finance Holdings (~51% owned, 49% external), L&T Technology Services (~73% owned, 27% external), LTIMindtree (~68% owned, 32% external). NCI is typically 15-18% of consolidated PAT and is stable.
LT.how_to_get_exact: Download L&T FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500510. NCI is shown as a separate line in the Consolidated Statement of P&L.

ADANIENT.source: Estimated from Adani Enterprises consolidated structure
ADANIENT.note: Adani Enterprises is a holding company with complex subsidiary structure including Adani Airports Holdings, AEML (energy), Adani New Industries. Many subsidiaries are unlisted with partial external ownership. NCI estimate is directional — actual figure varies significantly quarter to quarter due to volatile earnings in infrastructure projects. LOW confidence — verify from AR.
ADANIENT.how_to_get_exact: Download Adani Enterprises FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/512599. NCI line in Consolidated P&L.

ownership_detail.Various subsidiaries: Complex unlisted subsidiary structure — ownership varies

RELIANCE.source: Consolidated P&L — Reliance Industries annual report FY25
RELIANCE.note: Reliance has two major NCI sources: Jio Platforms (external investors including Google, Meta, KKR own ~33%) and Reliance Retail Ventures (Sovereign funds own ~4.9%). Despite large absolute NCI (~₹4000-5000cr), it is only ~5% of Reliance's massive consolidated PAT of ~₹80,000cr. MEDIUM confidence — Jio investor stakes are known but exact quarterly NCI allocation fluctuates.
RELIANCE.how_to_get_exact: Download Reliance FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500325. NCI is separately disclosed in the Consolidated P&L.

ownership_detail.Jio Platforms: External investors own ~33% (Google 7.7%, Meta 9.9%, KKR 2.3%, others)

M&M.source: Consolidated P&L — Mahindra & Mahindra annual report FY25
M&M.note: M&M consolidates Mahindra Finance (52% owned, 48% external — listed on NSE/BSE), Mahindra Lifespace (51% owned), Mahindra Holidays (69% owned). NCI is ~8% of consolidated PAT. Stable as long as ownership percentages are unchanged.
M&M.how_to_get_exact: Download M&M FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500520. NCI line in Consolidated P&L.

TATASTEEL.source: Consolidated P&L — Tata Steel annual report FY25
TATASTEEL.note: Tata Steel's NCI primarily comes from Tata Steel Long Products (~75% owned, 25% external — listed on BSE) and minor Indian subsidiaries. European operations (Netherlands/UK) are 100% owned so no NCI there. NCI is ~10-13% of consolidated PAT in normal years but can vary with steel cycle earnings.
TATASTEEL.how_to_get_exact: Download Tata Steel FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500470. NCI in Consolidated P&L.

ownership_detail.Tata Steel Long Products: Tata Steel owns ~75% — ~25% NCI (listed on BSE)

BHARTIARTL.source: Consolidated P&L — Bharti Airtel annual report FY25
BHARTIARTL.note: Airtel Africa is listed on the London Stock Exchange with ~33% external shareholders. This creates meaningful NCI. However, as Airtel's India business (100% owned effectively) grows faster, the NCI as % of total PAT is declining. ~3% of consolidated PAT is NCI from Airtel Africa.
BHARTIARTL.how_to_get_exact: Download Bharti Airtel FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532454. NCI in Consolidated P&L.

ownership_detail.Airtel Africa: Bharti Airtel owns ~67% — ~33% NCI (listed on LSE)

JSWSTEEL.source: Consolidated P&L — JSW Steel annual report FY25
JSWSTEEL.note: JSW Steel consolidates JSW Steel Coated Products, Bhushan Power & Steel (BPSL, acquired via IBC — some residual claims), and other subsidiaries. NCI is approximately 3-5% of consolidated PAT.
JSWSTEEL.how_to_get_exact: Download JSW Steel FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500228.

HINDALCO.source: Consolidated P&L — Hindalco Industries annual report FY25
HINDALCO.note: Novelis Inc (the US aluminium rolling subsidiary) is 100% owned by Hindalco — no NCI there despite being the largest earnings contributor. NCI comes from smaller Indian subsidiaries like Utkal Alumina International. NCI is low (~2-3%) for Hindalco despite its complex structure.
HINDALCO.how_to_get_exact: Download Hindalco FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500440.

SUNPHARMA.source: Consolidated P&L — Sun Pharmaceutical annual report FY25
SUNPHARMA.note: Taro Pharmaceutical Industries (listed on NYSE) is ~76% owned by Sun Pharma, with ~24% external shareholders. Taro contributes meaningful NCI. Other international subsidiaries are mostly wholly owned.
SUNPHARMA.how_to_get_exact: Download Sun Pharma FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/524715. Also check Taro Pharmaceutical's SEC filings for exact NCI.

ownership_detail.Taro Pharmaceutical: Sun Pharma owns ~76% — ~24% NCI (listed on NYSE)

APOLLOHOSP.source: Estimated from Apollo Hospitals consolidated structure
APOLLOHOSP.note: Apollo has various hospital JVs with minority partners and Apollo Health & Lifestyle subsidiary. NCI estimate is LOW confidence — actual figure needs verification from AR.
APOLLOHOSP.how_to_get_exact: Download Apollo Hospitals FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/508869.

ownership_detail.Apollo Health & Lifestyle: Apollo owns majority — some JV minority partners

NTPC.source: Consolidated P&L — NTPC annual report FY25
NTPC.note: NTPC has several joint venture power plants with state governments and private partners (e.g., NTPC-SAIL Power Company, Ratnagiri Gas & Power). These create minor NCI of approximately 1% of consolidated PAT.
NTPC.how_to_get_exact: Download NTPC FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532555.

ownership_detail.JV power plants: Various state govt and private JVs — minor NCI

ADANIPORTS.source: Estimated from Adani Ports consolidated structure
ADANIPORTS.note: Adani Ports has JV port operations internationally (Sri Lanka, Israel, Tanzania) with minority partners. Domestic operations are primarily wholly owned. ~3% NCI estimate.
ADANIPORTS.how_to_get_exact: Download Adani Ports FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532921.

ownership_detail.International port JVs: Various minority partners in overseas operations

DRREDDY.source: Estimated — Dr Reddy's subsidiaries mostly wholly owned
DRREDDY.note: Dr Reddy's global subsidiaries are primarily wholly owned. Minor NCI from some joint venture arrangements. LOW confidence — likely closer to 0-1%.
DRREDDY.how_to_get_exact: Download Dr Reddy's FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500124.

TATAMOTORS.source: Estimated — JLR is 100% owned, Indian operations mostly wholly owned
TATAMOTORS.note: Jaguar Land Rover is 100% owned — no NCI. Tata Motors Finance and other Indian subsidiaries mostly wholly owned. LOW confidence on this estimate — actual NCI may be lower. Note: Yahoo Finance is not providing EPS data for TATAMOTORS currently (UNVERIFIED quality).
TATAMOTORS.how_to_get_exact: Download Tata Motors FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500570.

ASIANPAINT.source: Estimated from Asian Paints international JV structure
ASIANPAINT.note: Asian Paints has JV operations in Middle East and Asia-Pacific with minority partners. Low NCI overall — ~2% estimate.
ASIANPAINT.how_to_get_exact: Download Asian Paints FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500820.

ownership_detail.International JVs: Middle East and Asia-Pacific minority partners

ITC.note: ITC has some hotel JV arrangements with minority partners. Overall NCI is negligible — <1% of PAT. May increase as ITC Hotels is being separately listed.
ITC.how_to_get_exact: Download ITC FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500875.

ownership_detail.ITC Hotels: Some JV properties with minority partners

TITAN.source: Estimated — Titan subsidiaries mostly wholly owned
TITAN.note: Titan has Favre-Leuba (Swiss watch brand, wholly owned) and CaratLane (acquired, now ~97% owned). Very minor NCI.
TITAN.how_to_get_exact: Download Titan FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500114.

CIPLA.source: Estimated — Cipla subsidiaries mostly wholly owned
CIPLA.note: Cipla's international subsidiaries (US, South Africa, others) are primarily wholly owned. Very minor NCI.
CIPLA.how_to_get_exact: Download Cipla FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500087.

MAXHEALTH.source: Estimated — Max Healthcare hospital JV structure
MAXHEALTH.note: Max Healthcare operates some hospitals as JVs with partners. Minor NCI overall.
MAXHEALTH.how_to_get_exact: Download Max Healthcare FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/543220.

ownership_detail.Hospital JVs: Some facilities operated as JVs with local partners

TATACONSUM.note: NourishCo Beverages is a JV between Tata Consumer and PepsiCo India. Minor NCI. Other subsidiaries mostly wholly owned.
TATACONSUM.how_to_get_exact: Download Tata Consumer FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500800.

HCLTECH.source: Estimated — HCL Tech subsidiaries mostly wholly owned
HCLTECH.note: HCL Technologies has some JV subsidiaries internationally. NCI is negligible — <1% of PAT.
HCLTECH.how_to_get_exact: Download HCL Tech FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532281.

SHRIRAMFIN.note: Shriram Finance has Shriram General Insurance as a JV with Sanlam (South African insurer). Minor NCI.
SHRIRAMFIN.how_to_get_exact: Download Shriram Finance FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/511218.

POWERGRID.note: PowerGrid operates several transmission SPVs, some as JVs with state utilities. Minor NCI.
POWERGRID.how_to_get_exact: Download PowerGrid FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532898.

ownership_detail.Transmission SPVs: Some JV SPVs with state utilities — minor NCI

TECHM.source: Estimated — Tech Mahindra subsidiaries mostly wholly owned
TECHM.note: Tech Mahindra's subsidiaries are primarily wholly owned. Minor NCI.
TECHM.how_to_get_exact: Download Tech Mahindra FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532755.

HDFCBANK.note: HDFC Bank's subsidiaries (HDB Financial, HDFC Securities) are wholly owned. No material NCI.

ICICIBANK.note: ICICI Bank subsidiaries mostly wholly owned. No material NCI.

SBIN.note: SBI Life and SBI Cards are separately listed but NOT consolidated into SBI's P&L — they're associates, not subsidiaries. No NCI in consolidated P&L.

BAJFINANCE.note: Bajaj Finance is itself the subsidiary (of Bajaj Finserv) — no further meaningful subsidiaries with NCI.

SBILIFE.note: SBI Life is a pure insurance company — no subsidiaries with NCI.

TCS.note: TCS subsidiaries are wholly owned delivery units. No external shareholders.

INFY.note: Infosys subsidiaries wholly owned. No NCI.

ONGC.note: ONGC Videsh and HPCL are subsidiaries but NCI is negligible at consolidated level.

COALINDIA.note: Coal India subsidiaries are operating divisions — no external shareholders.

NTPC.note: JV power plants with state govts create minor NCI.
NTPC.how_to_get_exact: Download NTPC FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532555.

POWERGRID.note: Some JV SPVs with state utilities — minor NCI.
POWERGRID.how_to_get_exact: Download PowerGrid FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/532898.

MARUTI.note: Suzuki Motor Gujarat is owned directly by Suzuki Japan, not by Maruti. No NCI in Maruti's consolidated P&L.

EICHERMOT.note: Royal Enfield is wholly owned. VE Commercial Vehicles (JV with Volvo) — Eicher owns 50.07%, but this is an associate, not a subsidiary. No material NCI in consolidated P&L.

HINDUNILVR.note: HUL subsidiaries are operational entities wholly owned by Unilever/HUL.

NESTLEIND.note: Nestle India is essentially a single-entity operation — no subsidiaries with NCI.

ULTRACEMCO.note: UltraTech subsidiaries (Nathdwara Cement etc.) are wholly owned.

BEL.note: Bharat Electronics — defence PSU with wholly owned subsidiaries.

ZOMATO.note: Zomato's subsidiaries (Blinkit, Hyperpure) are wholly owned.

JIOFIN.note: Jio Financial Services is a relatively new entity with minimal subsidiary NCI.

TRENT.note: Trent's retail operations (Westside, Zudio) are wholly owned.

INDIGO.note: IndiGo (InterGlobe Aviation) has no material subsidiaries with NCI.

DRREDDY.note: Primarily wholly owned global subsidiaries. Very minor NCI.
DRREDDY.how_to_get_exact: Download Dr Reddy's FY25 Annual Report from bseindia.com/500124.
